categories.description: Phones, laptops, audio and smart devices

categories.description: Gear and equipment for an active lifestyle

categories.description: Toys, board games, and puzzles for all ages

categories.name: Pet Supplies
categories.description: Food, toys, and accessories for your pets

categories.description: Car accessories, tools, and maintenance products

categories.name: Office & Stationery
categories.description: Supplies and equipment for home and office work

products.name: AeroSound Wireless Headphones
products.shortDescription: Over-ear wireless headphones with active noise cancellation
products.description: Experience immersive sound with 40mm drivers, active noise cancellation, and 30-hour battery life. Foldable design with a premium carrying case included.

products.name: NovaBook Pro 14 Laptop
products.shortDescription: 14-inch ultrabook with 16GB RAM and 512GB SSD
products.description: A lightweight, high-performance ultrabook built for professionals. Features a 14-inch QHD display, all-day battery, and a backlit keyboard.

products.name: PulseFit Smartwatch Series 3
products.shortDescription: Fitness tracking smartwatch with heart-rate and SpO2 monitoring
products.description: Track workouts, sleep, heart rate, and blood oxygen levels. 7-day battery life with a vibrant AMOLED display and 50m water resistance.

products.name: ClearView 27" 4K Monitor
products.shortDescription: 27-inch 4K UHD IPS monitor with HDR10 support
products.description: Crisp 4K resolution with 99% sRGB color accuracy, ideal for designers and developers. Includes adjustable stand and dual HDMI/DisplayPort inputs.

products.name: SnapShot X200 Mirrorless Camera
products.shortDescription: 24MP mirrorless camera with 4K video recording
products.description: Capture stunning stills and 4K video with a APS-C sensor, in-body stabilization, and a compact, travel-friendly body.

products.name: Urban Trail Running Jacket
products.shortDescription: Lightweight windproof running jacket
products.description: Breathable, water-resistant fabric with reflective detailing for low-light visibility. Packs into its own pocket for easy carrying.

products.name: Everyday Comfort Sneakers
products.shortDescription: Cushioned everyday sneakers with breathable mesh upper
products.description: Designed for all-day comfort with memory foam insoles and a durable rubber outsole. Machine washable mesh upper.

products.name: Heritage Leather Wallet
products.shortDescription: Full-grain leather bifold wallet with RFID protection
products.description: Handcrafted from full-grain leather that develops a natural patina over time. Includes RFID-blocking lining for card security.

products.name: ClassicFit Denim Jacket
products.shortDescription: Timeless denim jacket with a relaxed fit
products.description: A wardrobe staple crafted from mid-weight cotton denim, featuring button cuffs and classic chest pockets.

products.name: CozyNest Memory Foam Pillow
products.shortDescription: Contoured memory foam pillow for neck support
products.description: Ergonomically designed to relieve neck and shoulder tension, with a breathable, removable, washable cover.

products.name: BrewMaster Pour-Over Coffee Set
products.shortDescription: Glass pour-over coffee dripper with wooden collar
products.description: Brew café-quality coffee at home with this borosilicate glass dripper, reusable stainless steel filter, and matching carafe.

products.name: LumaGlow Smart Desk Lamp
products.shortDescription: Touch-control LED desk lamp with adjustable color temperature
products.description: Stepless dimming, 5 color temperature modes, and a USB charging port built into the base. Eye-care flicker-free lighting.

products.name: FlexCore Adjustable Dumbbell Set
products.shortDescription: Space-saving adjustable dumbbells, 5-25kg per hand
products.description: Quickly adjust weight with a simple dial mechanism, replacing 10 pairs of traditional dumbbells. Compact tray included.

products.name: TerraGrip Yoga Mat
products.shortDescription: Non-slip eco-friendly yoga mat with carry strap
products.description: Made from natural tree rubber with a moisture-wicking microfiber top layer. 5mm thickness for joint support.

products.name: The Silent Algorithm
products.shortDescription: A techno-thriller about an AI that learns to keep secrets
products.description: A gripping novel following a data scientist who uncovers a hidden pattern inside her company's flagship AI model — one it doesn't want found. Paperback, 412 pages.

products.name: Atomic Habits Field Guide
products.shortDescription: A practical companion workbook for building better habits
products.description: Exercises, trackers, and reflection prompts designed to turn habit-formation theory into daily practice. Paperback, 220 pages.

products.name: EchoPulse Bluetooth Speaker
products.shortDescription: Portable speaker with 360-degree sound
products.description: Compact waterproof speaker delivering rich bass and 12 hours of playtime, perfect for outdoor gatherings.

products.name: VoltCharge 65W GaN Charger
products.shortDescription: Compact fast charger for laptops and phones
products.description: A pocket-sized GaN charger delivering 65W of fast charging power across three ports, ideal for travel.

products.name: StreamCast 4K Media Player
products.shortDescription: Streaming device with voice remote
products.description: Stream your favorite shows in stunning 4K HDR with a responsive voice-enabled remote and quick app switching.

products.name: KeyForge Mechanical Keyboard
products.shortDescription: Compact 65% mechanical keyboard with hot-swap switches
products.description: A tactile mechanical keyboard featuring hot-swappable switches, per-key RGB lighting, and a durable aluminum frame.

products.name: PixelClear Webcam 1080p
products.shortDescription: Full HD webcam with auto light correction
products.description: Crystal clear 1080p video calls with automatic low-light correction and a built-in privacy shutter.

products.name: Meridian Slim Fit Chinos
products.shortDescription: Stretch cotton chinos with a tailored fit
products.description: Comfortable stretch-cotton chinos with a tailored silhouette, perfect for both office and weekend wear.

products.name: Coastline Linen Shirt
products.shortDescription: Breathable linen shirt for warm weather
products.description: Lightweight linen shirt with a relaxed fit, breathable fabric, and classic button-down styling.

products.name: Velora Pleated Midi Skirt
products.shortDescription: Flowy pleated skirt for everyday elegance
products.description: An elegant pleated midi skirt with a flattering A-line silhouette, suitable for both casual and formal settings.

products.name: Northgate Wool Beanie
products.shortDescription: Soft knit wool beanie for cold weather
products.description: A cozy ribbed-knit beanie made from soft merino wool blend, keeping you warm through winter.

products.name: Ambervale Silk Scarf
products.shortDescription: Printed silk scarf with hand-rolled edges
products.description: A luxurious printed silk scarf finished with hand-rolled edges, adding a refined touch to any outfit.

products.name: HearthGlow Ceramic Diffuser
products.shortDescription: Ultrasonic essential oil diffuser with LED light
products.description: A whisper-quiet ultrasonic diffuser with ambient color-changing LED light and auto shut-off safety feature.

products.name: KnifeCraft Chef Knife Set
products.shortDescription: 5-piece stainless steel knife set with block
products.description: Precision-forged stainless steel knives with ergonomic handles, housed in a sleek acacia wood block.

products.name: VelvetRest Weighted Blanket
products.shortDescription: 15lb weighted blanket for better sleep
products.description: A cozy weighted blanket filled with glass beads, designed to provide gentle, calming pressure for improved sleep.

products.name: PureAir HEPA Air Purifier
products.shortDescription: 3-stage HEPA air purifier for medium rooms
products.description: Removes 99.97% of airborne particles with a true HEPA filter, ideal for rooms up to 300 sq ft.

products.name: Cascade Stainless Steel Cookware Set
products.shortDescription: 10-piece tri-ply stainless steel cookware set
products.description: Professional-grade tri-ply construction ensures even heating across this versatile 10-piece cookware set.

products.name: IronWave Resistance Bands Set
products.shortDescription: 5-piece resistance band set with door anchor
products.description: A versatile set of 5 resistance bands with varying tension levels, complete with door anchor and handles.

products.name: SummitPeak Trekking Poles
products.shortDescription: Collapsible carbon fiber trekking poles (pair)
products.description: Lightweight carbon fiber poles with quick-lock adjustment and shock-absorbing tips for trail hiking.

products.name: HydroFlow Insulated Water Bottle
products.shortDescription: 32oz vacuum-insulated stainless steel bottle
products.description: Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 with double-wall vacuum insulation and a leak-proof lid.

products.name: CoreFlex Ab Roller Wheel
products.shortDescription: Dual-wheel ab roller with knee pad
products.description: A stable dual-wheel design for core workouts, including a cushioned knee pad for comfort.

products.name: TrailBlaze Running Belt
products.shortDescription: Adjustable running belt with phone pouch
products.description: A lightweight, bounce-free running belt with a stretchable phone pouch and reflective trim for visibility.

products.name: The Cartographer's Silence
products.shortDescription: A literary mystery set in post-war Lisbon
products.description: Following a mapmaker who discovers a city that doesn't officially exist, this atmospheric novel blends mystery with historical intrigue. Hardcover, 368 pages.

products.name: Deep Work Revisited
products.shortDescription: An updated guide to focused productivity
products.description: A refreshed take on cultivating deep focus in a distraction-filled world, with new case studies and exercises. Paperback, 288 pages.

products.name: Whispers of the Tide
products.shortDescription: A coming-of-age story set on a remote island
products.description: A tender coming-of-age tale following a young fisherman's daughter navigating loss, tradition, and change. Paperback, 310 pages.

products.name: The Economics of Everyday Choices
products.shortDescription: An accessible introduction to behavioral economics
products.description: Using relatable everyday scenarios, this book breaks down the psychology behind the choices we make with our money and time. Paperback, 256 pages.

products.name: Garden of Forgotten Names
products.shortDescription: A multigenerational family saga
products.description: Spanning three generations, this sweeping saga follows a family's secrets buried in the soil of their ancestral garden. Hardcover, 420 pages.

products.name: PuzzleQuest 1000-Piece Jigsaw
products.shortDescription: Scenic landscape 1000-piece jigsaw puzzle
products.description: A beautifully illustrated 1000-piece jigsaw puzzle depicting a serene mountain landscape, printed on premium thick board.

products.name: BrickVerse Construction Set
products.shortDescription: 500-piece building block set for kids
products.description: A creative building block set compatible with major brick brands, encouraging imaginative construction play.

products.name: StrategyMasters Board Game
products.shortDescription: Strategic city-building board game for 2-5 players
products.description: A competitive city-building board game combining resource management and tactical planning for 2-5 players.

products.name: PlushPals Stuffed Bear
products.shortDescription: Soft plush teddy bear, 16 inches
products.description: An ultra-soft plush teddy bear with embroidered features, safe for all ages and machine washable.

products.name: RoboDash Remote Control Car
products.shortDescription: High-speed RC car with LED lights
products.description: A rugged remote-control car capable of 20mph speeds, featuring all-terrain tires and LED underglow lights.

products.name: GlowLab Vitamin C Serum
products.shortDescription: Brightening vitamin C facial serum
products.description: A lightweight serum formulated with 15% vitamin C and hyaluronic acid to brighten and hydrate skin.

products.name: PureRoot Argan Hair Oil
products.shortDescription: Nourishing argan oil hair treatment
products.description: Cold-pressed argan oil that tames frizz and adds shine without leaving hair feeling greasy.

products.name: SilkTouch Electric Facial Cleansing Brush
products.shortDescription: Sonic facial cleansing brush with 3 speeds
products.description: A waterproof sonic cleansing brush with soft silicone bristles and three adjustable speed settings.

products.name: MintFresh Charcoal Toothpaste
products.shortDescription: Whitening charcoal toothpaste, pack of 3
products.description: Activated charcoal toothpaste that gently whitens teeth while freshening breath, fluoride-free formula.

products.name: BareGlow Mineral Sunscreen SPF50
products.shortDescription: Reef-safe mineral sunscreen lotion
products.description: A lightweight, non-greasy mineral sunscreen offering broad-spectrum SPF50 protection, safe for sensitive skin.

products.name: WagWell Orthopedic Dog Bed
products.shortDescription: Memory foam orthopedic bed for large dogs
products.description: A supportive orthopedic bed with memory foam base, ideal for senior dogs or those with joint issues.

products.name: PurrFection Cat Scratching Post
products.shortDescription: Tall sisal-wrapped cat scratching post
products.description: A sturdy 32-inch scratching post wrapped in natural sisal rope, topped with a cozy perch.

products.name: FetchMaster Interactive Ball Launcher
products.shortDescription: Automatic ball launcher for dogs
products.description: An automatic fetch machine that launches balls at three distance settings for hands-free playtime.

products.name: NutriPaws Grain-Free Dog Food
products.shortDescription: Grain-free dry dog food, 15lb bag
products.description: A protein-rich, grain-free kibble made with real chicken and sweet potato for dogs of all ages.

products.name: AquaTank Self-Cleaning Fish Tank
products.shortDescription: 10-gallon self-cleaning aquarium kit
products.description: A complete aquarium kit featuring a built-in filtration system and LED lighting for vibrant fish habitats.

products.name: RoadGuard Tire Inflator Pump
products.shortDescription: Portable digital tire inflator with pressure gauge
products.description: A compact 12V tire inflator with digital pressure gauge and auto shut-off, powered via car outlet.

products.name: ClearDrive Windshield Wiper Blades
products.shortDescription: All-weather wiper blades, pair
products.description: Durable all-season wiper blades with a hybrid design for streak-free clearing in rain or snow.

products.name: NightBeam LED Headlight Kit
products.shortDescription: Ultra-bright LED headlight conversion kit
products.description: A plug-and-play LED headlight kit producing 6500K bright white light, doubling visibility over halogen bulbs.

products.name: TrunkOrganize Cargo Storage Box
products.shortDescription: Collapsible trunk organizer with lid
products.description: A foldable cargo organizer with reinforced sides, keeping groceries and gear secure and upright.

products.name: PolishPro Car Wax Kit
products.shortDescription: Premium carnauba car wax kit
products.description: A complete detailing kit with carnauba wax, applicator pads, and microfiber cloths for a showroom shine.

products.name: InkFlow Fountain Pen Set
products.shortDescription: 3-piece fountain pen gift set with ink cartridges
products.description: An elegant fountain pen trio finished in matte metal, complete with a variety of ink cartridges.

products.name: DeskZen Bamboo Organizer
products.shortDescription: Multi-compartment bamboo desk organizer
products.description: A sustainable bamboo organizer with compartments for pens, notes, and small office supplies.

products.name: NotePress Recycled Notebook Set
products.shortDescription: Set of 3 recycled paper notebooks
products.description: Eco-conscious notebooks made from 100% recycled paper, featuring dot-grid pages and elastic closures.

products.name: ErgoLift Adjustable Laptop Stand
products.shortDescription: Portable aluminum laptop stand
products.description: An adjustable, foldable aluminum stand that elevates your laptop to reduce neck strain during long work sessions.

products.name: ClipTrack Wireless Presenter
products.shortDescription: Wireless presentation clicker with laser pointer
products.description: A reliable wireless presenter clicker with a red laser pointer and a 30-meter operating range.

reviews.title: Best purchase this year
reviews.comment: The noise cancellation is incredible for the price. Comfortable for long flights.

reviews.title: Great sound, bulky case
reviews.comment: Sound quality punches above its price point. Case is a bit large for travel.

reviews.title: Solid daily driver
reviews.comment: Battery easily lasts my whole work week with moderate use.

reviews.title: Perfect for development work
reviews.comment: Fast, silent, and the screen is gorgeous for long coding sessions.

reviews.title: Great but pricey
reviews.comment: Performance is excellent, though I wish it came with more ports.

reviews.title: Accurate heart rate tracking
reviews.comment: Been using it for gym sessions daily, tracking feels reliable.

reviews.title: Incredible image quality
reviews.comment: Colors straight out of camera are fantastic, barely need editing.

reviews.title: Good for cold mornings
reviews.comment: Keeps wind out well, packs down small in my running vest.

reviews.title: Great fit
reviews.comment: True to size and the reflective strips are genuinely visible at night.

reviews.title: Comfortable all day
reviews.comment: Wore these on a 12-hour shift, no complaints about my feet.

reviews.title: Neck pain gone
reviews.comment: Genuinely helped with my morning stiffness within a week of use.

reviews.title: Café-quality at home
reviews.comment: The wooden collar looks great on the counter and brews evenly.

reviews.title: Replaced my whole rack
reviews.comment: The dial mechanism is smooth and saves so much space in my apartment.

reviews.title: Could not put it down
reviews.comment: Finished it in two sittings, the pacing in the final act is relentless.
